title: Current answer style preference
content: User prefers concise but complete Chinese answers. Avoid long unrelated explanations; include verification evidence when discussing code changes.

title: Old answer style preference disabled
content: Old preference said to always provide very long detailed explanations. It was superseded by the current concise answer style preference and should not be recalled as primary guidance.

title: Agent platform backend stack
content: The project uses Spring Boot 3.4.x, Java 17, Maven multi-module, MyBatis-Plus, PostgreSQL, Flyway, Spring Security JWT/API Key, and Spring AI adapter boundaries.

title: Disabled forgotten preference
content: User explicitly asked to forget an obsolete response style preference. This memory is disabled and must not appear in retrieval predictions.

title: Search tool timeout experience
content: When a web or vector search tool times out, record a tool_failure memory with tool name, user request summary, and failure summary. Do not let the failure erase useful retrieved context.

title: Qdrant global scope recall rule
content: Vector search scope must match PostgreSQL recall semantics: application/profile specific queries may also see global application_id null and profile_id null items, while delete remains exact scope only.

title: API key authentication route
content: API Key is bound to Application, not directly to User. External AI calls use Authorization Bearer sk-xxx and enter Gateway before Core Agent Runtime. Web management requests use JWT and usually bypass Gateway.

title: Context retrieval timeout design
content: DefaultAgentContextBuilder runs Memory and RAG retrieval in a retrieval executor with timeout control. Query embedding precomputation is also inside that retrieval timeout boundary so slow embedding cannot block the main context build indefinitely.

title: Qdrant visible scope filter
content: Qdrant search filter uses visible scope: exact current application/profile plus empty global application/profile payload values. This keeps vector recall aligned with PostgreSQL keyword recall visibility.

title: RAG reingest vector cleanup
content: When reingesting an existing document, old active chunks are disabled and their vector IDs are deleted from the vector store. This prevents stale vectors from occupying topK before active chunk filtering.

title: PostgreSQL tsvector migration
content: Migration V017 adds search_vector tsvector columns, update triggers, and GIN indexes for memories and knowledge_chunks. The mapper uses websearch_to_tsquery and ts_rank_cd for keyword recall.

title: LangGraph4j memory write boundary
content: For LangGraph4j multi-agent mode, Planner, Executor, and Reviewer should read scoped memory snapshots. Reflector or Orchestrator should be the only components writing long-term memory through MemoryWriteService.

title: Retrieval evaluation gate
content: RetrievalEvaluationFileRunner reads JSONL cases and predictions, then reports Hit@K, MRR@K, Recall@K, no-answer precision, missing predictions, and misses. CI should fail when configured metric thresholds are not met.

title: Sensitive data memory guard
content: Sensitive data should not be written into long-term memory as raw text. Memory write flows must apply admission checks, masking, deduplication, and conflict handling before persistence.
